quote_of_day.text: i don't wanna die hating on everything like a salty faggot. everyone's got one life and let them enjoy it however they want
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of antisemitic sentiment moved into the board, bringing with it a downpour of hate speech. Anon called for war against Jews, sparking brief but intense gusts of hostility.

A scattered high-pressure ridge of speculation formed around Anon's musings on a hypothetical Nazi victory in World War 2. The discussion drew a moderate weight of replies, with Anon pushing the idea that the world lost the war.

A light drizzle of lore-seeking and curiosity fell on the board, as one Anon expressed interest in gathering information on a woman. The inquiry drew a few responses, but remained a minor weather phenomenon compared to the more intense discussions.

A cold snap of social conservatism also passed through, with Anon expressing outrage over the shaming of a man who wanted a virgin wife.

articles.title: Anon Speculates on Nazi Victory in World War 2
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread by stating 'World lost the world war 2.' One anon responded by suggesting that a Nazi victory would have been possible if they had focused on the Eastern campaign and limited their goals to Europe, from France to Archangelsk, which would have made them the largest nation in the world.

This anon noted that Nazi victory would have involved deprioritizing the war against Jews.

Another anon chimed in, stating that a Nazi win would have been a 'golden timeline' for India, as they would have helped local nationalists establish a state without Dalit republic or Judeo-American influence.

A respondent expressed the view that the board had 'lost' in 1945, lamenting the current state of the world as being controlled by Jewish influence.

One anon expressed frustration that the Nazis had not won, stating that the world would be in a better place if they had.

This anon also mentioned that even a Nazi victory would not have been enough to overcome the power of Jews.

Anon also disputed the scale of the Holocaust, with one claiming that only 271,000 people died, while another described this figure as a 'rhetorical post-war guess.' Anon also made comments on the Nazis being 'the best shot' against Jewish influence.

articles.title: Anon Shares YouTube Links, Calls for 'Goyims' to Consume Content
articles.body:
Anon posted two links to the same YouTube video, accompanied by the comment 'Cant wait for goyims to consoom it like a cattle'.

One respondent expressed frustration that 'jewish AI' was taking over stimulating tasks, leaving them with nothing but 'goyslop' for entertainment. They claimed to have been interested in coding and working on projects, but AI had ruined those plans.

Another anon described the content as 'perfect goyslop for goy cattles,' adding that anyone with decent taste in video games knows it will be poorly received by normies who will pretend it's a masterpiece.

One poster reacted to a perceived slight with 'Acha pajeet?

No one cares about your feelings or opinions.' A different anon responded with 'choo choo goy get your 6k ready for your jewish master,' while another simply stated 'consumption begins'.

Other comments included 'Looks like Typical Jewish entertainment. nothing surprising,' and 'goyims are pathetic and predictable,' with one user writing 'Aagaya Goy Cattle'.

articles.title: Anon seeks 'lore' on woman, discussion ensues
articles.body:
Anon started a thread seeking information on a woman, stating they were 'incredibly curious' about her and wanted to gather all available lore. They explicitly asked to exclude caste-related discussions.

Another anon responded with a brief comment that the woman was 'probably doing just fine' and that she was likely irritated by the low-quality discussions on the board.

This anon also mentioned that she was exceptionally good-looking compared to others on the board. The original poster pressed for more information, asking about the woman's history in detail and her experiences.

They expressed frustration with another anon, stating they did not care about their response. Other anons joined the discussion, with one asking for the woman's full lore and another bumping the thread to gather more information.

One respondent made a crude comment about the woman's supposed superiority to their own family. Some anons made brief, seemingly unrelated comments. One stated that a person named Randi was allegedly 'mindraped' by Inchamars.

Another simply stated that the woman in question was 'stacie'.

articles.title: Anon Calls for War Against Jews
articles.body:
Anon posted that "Jews are enemies. Indiachan will fight them and win the war." One anon responded that "chinks are a submissive race", suggesting they are content with being "jewish slaves".

Another anon disagreed, saying "no we dont" fight Jews and joked about using Israeli tactics to harm Palestinian children.

Other anons chimed in, with one stating "There is no reason for a rational Indian Hindu to 'hate' jews" but also suggesting it's rational to "hate" Muslims.

Anon also urged focusing on "actually defeat[ing] the Jews", and another claimed only "true Aryans" can do so.

articles.title: Shaming a man for wanting a virgin wife
articles.body:
Anon expressed outrage over shaming a man for wanting a virgin wife. The original poster mentioned their cousin in a tier 3 city who was looking for a girl in an arranged setup and didn't want one who had a boyfriend before.

Anon replied that India has always been 'woke' when it comes to widows, citing ancient times when dating was normalised and widows were allowed to remarry. Another Anon responded with an unclear comment about the cousin.

A third Anon simply said 'Accha' in response.
